dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 6210 IH: Senior Savings Protection Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Ms. Matsui (for herself, Mr. Bilirakis, Ms. DelBene, Ms. Malliotakis, and Ms. Craig) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Ways and Means, and in addition to the Committee on Energy and Commerce, for a period to be subsequently determined by the Speaker, in each case for consideration of such provisions as fall within the jurisdiction of the committee concerned

form.official-title: To provide for an extension of funding outreach and assistance for low-income programs.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Senior Savings Protection Act.

section.header: Extension of funding outreach and assistance for low-income programs

subsection.text: Subsection (a)(1)(B) of section 119 of the Medicare Improvements for Patients and Providers Act of 2008 (42 U.S.C. 1395b–3 note) is amended—

paragraph.text: in clause (xiii), by striking and at the end;
in clause (xiv), by striking the period at the end and inserting ; and; and
by inserting after clause (xiv) the following new clause:

clause.text: for each of fiscal years 2026 through 2030, $15,000,000.

subsection.text: Subsection (b)(1)(B) of such section 119 is amended—

paragraph.text: in clause (xiii), by striking and at the end;
in clause (xiv), by striking the period at the end and inserting ; and; and
by inserting after clause (xiv) the following new clause:

clause.text: for each of fiscal years 2026 through 2030, $15,000,000.

subsection.text: Subsection (c)(1)(B) of such section 119 is amended—

paragraph.text: in clause (xiii), by striking and at the end;
in clause (xiv), by striking the period at the end and inserting ; and; and
by inserting after clause (xiv) the following new clause:

clause.text: for each of fiscal years 2026 through 2030, $5,000,000.

subsection.header: Coordination of efforts To inform older Americans about benefits available under Federal and State programs
subsection.text: Subsection (d)(2) of such section 119 is amended—

paragraph.text: in clause (xiii), by striking and at the end;
in clause (xiv), by striking the period at the end and inserting ; and; and
by inserting after clause (xiv) the following new clause:

clause.text: for each of fiscal years 2026 through 2030, $15,000,000.
